---
applyTo: ".specify/**/*.md,AGENTS.md,SPEC.md"
---

Keep instruction and spec documents concrete and executable.

- Prefer explicit commands, file paths, and trigger-based rules over vague advice.
- Link to authoritative docs instead of duplicating large sections.
- Keep root-level guidance short; push local details into nested files when possible.
- If examples or code maps become stale, update them in the same change.
- Comment guidance should reinforce self-documenting code, not encourage comment sprawl.
